content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 18, 2002

Leiland S. Hurd
1830 Hamilton Avenue
San Jose, CA 95125

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-02-063

Dear Mr. Hurd:

    Pursuant to our telephone conversation of March 13, 2002, you have rescinded your request for written advice.

    If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me toll-free at 866/275-3772.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
